title: notifications-push — webhook namespaces
description: This module does NOT own outbound customer webhooks (delegated to notifications core). Documents INBOUND provider feedback delegated via the webhook module.

inboundNamespace.downstream_handler: IngestPushProviderWebhookListener → IngestPushProviderWebhookJob → normalises to PushDelivered / PushInvalidToken / PushOpened

supportedProviders.note: FCM feedback comes via Google Cloud Pub/Sub push subscription. Signature verification uses Google OIDC JWT.
APNs delivers feedback via the streaming Feedback Service. Signatures via mTLS + configured trust store.

outbound.note: Push-channel outbound events (push.delivered / opened / clicked) aggregated + published by notifications CORE via channel-neutral event names (notification.delivered, notification.opened, etc.).
